name: Spring Kichadi
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Brown or white basmati rice
1 tsp Black or brown mustard seeds
1 Green onions, trimmed and thinly sliced with white and green parts separated
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse rice and peas in cool water; drain.
2. Heat ghee in a medium saucepan.
3. Add cumin, mustard, and fennel seeds; sauté until mustard seeds begin to pop.
4. Add drained rice and peas, bay leaf, and turmeric; stir well.
5. Cook for 2-3 more minutes.
6. Add onion white parts, ginger, celery, salt, and water to the pan.
7. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
8. Add carrots, cauliflower, and sage. Return to a simmer, adding additional water if necessary to keep ingredients completely covered in liquid.
9. Continue cooking for an additional 30-40 minutes.
10. Stir in remaining green onions; cook for another 5 minutes.
11. Garnish with roasted sunflower seeds and chopped cilantro before serving.
